# Metrics and Diagnosis Tree

## Metric hierarchy

Do not optimise for views alone.

### Gate metrics

```text
shown / impressions
chose-to-view / viewed-vs-swiped
1–3s retention
average watch time
average percentage viewed
completion rate
rewatch / replay
saves
shares / sends
comments
profile clicks
follows / subscribers
search traffic
7d and 30d long-tail views
negative feedback / hides / not interested
```

## Platform-specific metric emphasis

### TikTok

```text
watch time
full watch
skip avoidance
shares
comments
search traffic
saves if available
follows
```

### YouTube Shorts

```text
shown in feed
how many chose to view
engaged views
average view duration
average percentage viewed
subscribers gained
search terms
```

### Instagram Reels

```text
average watch time
saves per reach
sends/shares per reach
comments
profile visits
non-follower performance
Trial Reel performance
```

## Diagnosis tree

```text
Low impressions / shown:
    Topic unclear, eligibility issue, weak account-content consistency.

High shown, low chose-to-view:
    First frame failed. Change visual opening.

Good chose-to-view, weak 3s retention:
    Hook failed. Tighten first sentence and tension.

Good early retention, poor completion:
    Body failed. First payoff too late, pacing too slow, structure unclear.

Good completion, poor saves:
    Video is watchable but not reusable. Add checklist/template/rule.

Good completion, poor sends:
    Useful but not socially targeted. Add recipient-specific angle.

High comments, low completion:
    Provocative but not satisfying. Add proof and structure.

High saves, low follows:
    Useful standalone video, weak account promise. Add series identity.

High views, weak follows:
    Broad/trendy reach disconnected from niche. Re-anchor account positioning.

Good 24h spike, weak 7d/30d tail:
    Feed/trend worked, search value weak.

Weak 24h, strong 7d/30d:
    Searchable topic may be working. Scale long-tail variants.
```

## Analysis cadence

```text
24h: first-frame/hook and initial audience fit
72h: retention and early action quality
7d: search/trend durability
30d: long-tail value and format scalability
```

## Decision rules

```text
Scale if:
    high retention + high saves/sends/follows.

Repackage if:
    good completion + low chose-to-view.

Rewrite body if:
    good start + poor completion.

Rebuild value if:
    good completion + low saves/sends.

Retire if:
    low early retention + low completion + low action.
```
